title: psidium celastroides
intro: Psidium celastroides, also known as the Maypops or Maypop Passionflower, is a species of flowering plant in the passionflower family (Passifloraceae). This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psidium celastroides include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting better sleep, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Psidium celastroides include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
